title: Process for Checking a Stochastic Time Series Model
description: A flowchart outlining the sequential steps and feedback loops involved in validating the adequacy of a fitted stochastic time series model.
relationships: Fit model to Original Time Series to get Fitted Model
Calculate Residual Series from Fitted Model
Analyze Residual Series for white noise using ACF Plot
Perform Ljung-Box Test on Residuals for statistical confirmation
If residuals are white noise: conclude Model Adequate
If residuals are not white noise: conclude Model Inadequate and return to model identification stage
